creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text:
That is strange to see the problem with UFS. I was able to reproduce it
for ZFS only, which unlike UFS doesn't closes devices on shutdown. Still
I guess r245443 change committed to HEAD may help to mark volume as
clean (if it is not really dirty). I'll merge it down to 9- and probably
8-STABLE in two weeks. If it won't help, then it is question not to
geom_mirror why disk activity goes on after syncing stage of shutdown
complete.

-- 
Alexander Motin
